summary: Verified fix for the missing `case "gallery":` in AdminHomepage SectionEditor. Project Gallery accordion at /admin now renders the full editor form (eyebrow, title pre/highlight, tagline, + ADD project button, and ListEditor rows with title/location/note/images). Added a new project 'Test Project'/'Jaipur', saved via SAVE CHANGES, and confirmed persistence on the public /gallery page.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminHomepage.jsx is 510 lines — reasonable but approaching the 700-line threshold. Consider extracting SectionEditor and per-section renderers into separate files (e.g. sections/GallerySection.jsx) so a similar missing-case regression is impossible in the future.

The switch statement `default: return null;` silently renders nothing for unrecognised keys. Add a console.warn or a visible 'This section has no editor configured' hint to surface future regressions immediately during development.
seed_data_creation: Created one Project Gallery item {title: 'Test Project', location: 'Jaipur'} via the admin UI and persisted via PUT /api/settings. Main agent may want to delete it before shipping.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage tab is accessed via data-testid=admin-tab-homepage or text=Homepage. Gallery section testid=hp-section-gallery; its inner + ADD button is the *last* button.role('button', {name: 'Add'}) inside the section (there is no separate Add button because the section has no other list). MultiImagePicker upload tile is a <label> element inside data-testid=hp-gallery-item-{i}-images. Location on /gallery page renders uppercased via CSS, so text assertions should be case-insensitive.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause: SectionEditor switch in AdminHomepage.jsx was missing `case "gallery":`, so when the Project Gallery accordion expanded, SectionEditor returned null (via `default: return null;`) — accordion body only showed the 'Reset section to defaults' footer. Fix (already applied by main agent): re-added the case at lines 348-372 that renders Header inputs (Eyebrow, Title pre, Title highlight, Tagline) plus a ListEditor with defaultItem={title, location, note, images:[]} and fields including type:'gallery' for the MultiImagePicker. Verified: fields render, +ADD creates a new project row, typing works, SAVE persists to /api/settings, and /gallery page reads back and renders the project card.
